theme: Compute many linear forms sharing intermediates
title: Shared XOR Circuits for Many Linear Forms
strategies: fully independent per-target chain-XOR, zero sharing (trivial)
iterative re-mined pool: commit to the shared partial sum with the most co-occurring targets each round, recomputing after every commit (strong)
true minimum-gate GF(2) circuit (NP-hard in general, open ceiling, uncovered)
